arts.ttl: Unwanted £37m misfit downs Barcelona as Premier League club struggle to find buyer
arts.sum: UD Las Palmas secured the services of Fabio Silva on loan from Wolverhampton Wanderers after the Premier League side were unable to facilitate a permanent transfer for the wantaway star

arts.ttl: Barcelona suffer worrying injury blow as defender 'vomits blood' against Las Palmas
arts.sum: Barcelona suffered another injury blow during their La Liga match against Las Palmas when Alejandro Balde was stretchered off after sustaining a concerning injury.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star named official Man of the Match despite loss to Las Palmas
arts.sum: A leading member of the attacking ranks at Barcelona was named Man of the Match for his performance in the club’s meeting with Las Palmas. This comes despite the Blaugrana…

arts.ttl: Barcelona v Las Palmas: Lamine Yamal dependence laid bare again
arts.sum: When he has started in LaLiga, Barca have won all 11 fixtures, most notably a blistering 4-0 success over Real Madrid at the Bernabeu. Lamine Yamal was spotted watching on casually with Lionel Messi’s name on his boots as Barcelona were surprisingly defeated 2-1 by Las Palmas on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Barcelona stars refuse media interviews after Las Palmas
arts.sum: Barcelona’s stars refused to speak to Movistar, on the back of their side’s defeat at the hands of Las Palmas on Saturday. Hansi Flick’s troops were of course back in…

arts.ttl: ‘I don’t care about my goal’ - Raphinha rages after Barca defeat
arts.sum: Barcelona captain Raphinha was left raging after Saturday’s 2-1 defeat to Las Palmas in La Liga. Raphinha spoke out after the game and his frustration at the result was evident.

arts.ttl: Barca suffer loss on their 125th anniversary
arts.sum: La Liga leaders Barcelona's 125th anniversary celebrations were spoiled by Las Palmas who claimed a shock 2-1 win at Estadi Olimpic Lluis Companys on Saturday after Fabio Silva scored the winner to extend the hosts' winless league run to three games.

arts.ttl: Barcelona loses at home for 1st time this season, falling 2-1 to Las Palmas
arts.sum: Barcelona had played superbly in the first three months under new coach Hansi Flick and was flying high after convincing victories over Real Madrid in the domestic competition and Bayern Munich in the Champions League. B arcelona lost at home for the first time this season when the Spanish league leader was stunned 2-1 by Las Palmas on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Barcelona 1-2 Las Palmas: Match report and talking points as Catalans haunted by ex-players on 125th anniversary
arts.sum: Barcelona suffered a first home La Liga defeat against Las Palmas in 53 years on Saturday afternoon, falling to a 2-1 score-line at the Estadi Olimpic Lluis Companys.

arts.ttl: European football: Las Palmas leave Barça reeling to spoil 125th anniversary
arts.sum: Leaders slip to surprise 2-1 defeat at home in La Liga Hosts had introduced new mascot to mark anniversary Barcelona suffered their first home defeat of the season as Las Palmas stunned the Spanish league leaders 2-1 at Estadi Olímpic Lluís Companys on Saturday. Barcelona have played superbly in the first three months under new coach Hansi Flick. Coming into the visit of Las Palmas, Barça were flying high after convincing victories over Real Madrid in La Liga and Bayern Munich in the Champions League, winning all eight home games to start the campaign. But Flick’s side have now gone three La Liga rounds without a win. Prior to the loss to Las Palmas, Barça fell 1-0 at Real Sociedad and drew 2-2 at Celta Vigo. This roundup will update later on Saturday Continue reading...
